text.title: Launch RACI Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Launch RACI Template methodology end-to-end.

step.name: enumerate-workstreams
step.action: List workstreams covering pre/day/post phases; minimum 6 rows for non-trivial launches.

step.name: assign-a-then-r
step.action: For each row pick exactly one A; then R (may equal A); then C and I distinctly.
step.decision-gate: If any row lacks exactly one A, halt and resolve with the lead.

step.name: cite-evidence
step.action: Annotate each assignment with source; flag inferred names 'verify-before-launch'.

step.name: rehearse
step.action: Run launch rehearsal walking each row T-14 -> T+14; update the RACI live.

step.name: publish-and-snapshot
step.action: Publish under canonical path; snapshot it on T-1; freeze edits during launch window.
step.decision-gate: Edits during launch window require lead's explicit approval and a post-launch ADR.
